notes: Within-year cross-cohort test of parental transmission. For each country-year in WCDE v3 microdata, lower-secondary completion share of age 20-24 is regressed on the same share for age 45-49 (one generation older, measured simultaneously). Country FE, country-clustered SEs. This specification does not rely on the 25-year forward lag: parent and child are observed in the same year, so any common cross-country time shock in the intervening decades is absorbed by design.
